name: guru-create-task-commit
description: Create a reviewed Trellis task work commit after Phase 2, including finding-fix and revision commits, with exact staging and fresh evidence.

entry_preconditions.binding: actual repository root equals the mapped task worktree
task id, repo-relative directory, branch and in_progress status
entry_preconditions.freshness: files and current branch still match

entry_preconditions.binding: schema 1.2 approval and planning document digests
passed check, checked artifact digests, dirty paths and pre-commit HEAD
entry_preconditions.freshness: candidate self artifact is the only permitted post-check delta
current bytes and primary issue match

entry_preconditions.evidence: Git HEAD and candidate git object

entry_preconditions.binding: ordinary state without merge, cherry-pick, revert, rebase, sequencer or am markers
entry_preconditions.freshness: checked during candidate validation, before staging and immediately before commit

entry_preconditions.evidence: NUL-delimited Git status and content identities
entry_preconditions.binding: complete staged, unstaged, untracked, delete and rename facts; ordinary SHA-256/mode/delete and initialized clean gitlink HEAD are exact index authorities
entry_preconditions.freshness: current snapshot, candidate raw bytes, complete live index preimage and operation state still match through isolated validation; index.lock remains a sentinel and ref/index/candidate guards remain owned through the final candidate identity-read linearization point

entry_preconditions.binding: explicit authorized flag, source and evidence
entry_preconditions.freshness: authorization applies to this exact stage/message plan

validators.objective_scope: schema, identity, evidence, freshness, snapshot, exact paths, shared parser and authorization facts

artifact-authorized ordinary/gitlink/candidate bindings, isolated index and detached commit validation, guarded conditional ref/candidate rollback under an index.lock sentinel, independent final-index publication, final candidate identity-read linearization, immutable commit blob/result digest evidence, and raw commit postconditions

external_exits.evidence: task commit plan result and current Git HEAD
AI review or candidate validation revision evidence
semantic conflict, authorization failure, dangerous operation, hook mutation or objective postcondition error

reentry.identity: task id, sequence, Phase 2 digest, pre-commit HEAD and dirty snapshot digest
reentry.freshness: all evidence matches and sequence has not executed
